parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { "messaging_product": "whatsapp", "to": $('Prepare Data').item.json.customer_phone, "type": "text", "text": { "body": "Hi " + $('Prepare Data').item.json.customer_name + ", your cart is still waiting for you. Finish here: " + $('Prepare Data').item.json.checkout_url } } }}

parameters.content:
## 1. Trigger & schedule
Webhook receives the abandoned checkout, replies instantly, then **Wait** holds for 60 min.

**Demo tip:** send `"delay_minutes": 1` in the payload to fire in 1 minute.

## 2. Generate, send & log
LLM (Groq/OpenRouter) writes friendly copy → clean HTML email via Gmail SMTP → result logged (sent/failed) to `~/.n8n/cart_recovery_log.csv`.

## Optional: WhatsApp
Fires only if `customer_phone` is present. **Disabled by default** — needs a Meta token + approved template to go live.
